meta.title: Diamond Club — Investments in natural diamonds
meta.description: Investment shares in natural diamonds from $50. $0.56 DCT minimum guarantee + DCT token growth up to 420% per year. opBNB blockchain. Audited smart contract.
meta.og_title: 💎 Diamond Club — Diamonds from $50 per share
meta.og_description: Up to +420% return per year. $0.56 DCT minimum guarantee. Diamonds at up to 70% off market. opBNB blockchain.

hero.subtitle: Certified natural diamond. No jewelry markup. No middlemen. DCT token on the blockchain — your share in your wallet.
hero.trust1_label: Minimum after 1 year — even if the market crashes

lot.description: A certified natural diamond from our partner diamond house. Selected by club experts.
lot.description_small: International GIA certificate · number published at sale start
lot.timer_before_sub: After the start, partners will have 30 days to collect all 100 shares
lot.timer_collecting_label: Collection in progress · until lot closes

concept.title_html:
The diamond market is open.
For everyone.
concept.lead: For 150 years natural diamonds have grown in price without a single major drawdown. But ordinary people were locked out of this market. Until today.
concept.quote: For the first time in the world — tokenized investments in natural diamonds inside a club asset system.
concept.old_item1_desc: To buy an investment-grade 1-carat diamond — you need capital. Real money.
concept.old_item2_desc: A diamond bought for $1,000 is sold by jewelers for $4,000–5,000.
concept.old_item3_desc: Hide it for years. Pay for storage. Worry about theft.
concept.old_item4_desc: Buyers offer 20% of market price. Invested $5,000 — got back $1,000.
concept.old_item5_desc: The real return of an ordinary lone investor.
concept.new_item1_desc: Minimum share — the cost of dinner. Size depends on the diamond in the lot.
concept.new_item2_desc: The diamond is bought directly from the producer. No jewelry markup.
concept.new_item3_desc: Diamond in a secure vault. Your share — NFT in your SafePal.
concept.new_item4_desc: Sell your token on the club exchange. No buyers, no losses.
concept.new_item5_desc: Club guarantee in dollars plus the growth of the DCT token value.

how.lead: From your first share to profit — five transparent steps. All on the blockchain. No middlemen.
how.step1_p: Open the cabinet, choose your Diamond. Pay USDT. From $50 per share — depends on the lot.
how.step2_p: 85% of your amount turns into DCT tokens at the starting price of $0.50. 80 tokens per share.
how.step3_p: The club rotates the Diamond: sells — buys — sells again. on average 3–6 cycles per year.
how.step4_p: The profit from each sale goes into the token backing. The DCT price grows for all owners simultaneously.
how.step5_p: At any time, sell your tokens at the new price. Plus $0.56 DCT in case of force majeure

math.lead: The example calculation is based on an average Diamond worth $4,000 with 6 asset rotations by the club within a year. Actual result may be higher or lower.
math.transparency_p1: Every dollar you invest in a share is split in the smart contract. These percentages cannot be changed. They are the same for everyone. Anyone can check the blockchain and verify.
math.transparency_p2: No hidden fees. No "director's pocket". Everything is hardcoded.
math.growth_p: Diamond purchase $4,000 · club sells for $8,000 · profit goes into backing
math.stage1_outcome_html:
Your $100 = 80 tokens
100% of your capital in the diamond
math.stage2_outcome_html:
Your $100 is now = $168
The club sold the diamond once
math.stage3_outcome_html:
Your $100 is now = $310
Half a year of club work
math.stage4_outcome_html:
Your $100 is now = $520
A year of club work
math.disclaimer: And if the diamond goes into a piece of jewelry — the token price reaches $4.10 in 3 cycles. Your $100 turns into $820. +720% per year.

system.title_html:
No need to search. No need to persuade.
No need to sell.
system.lead: You're not buying a share — you're buying a working system. One action launches an endless flow of clients who become investors.
system.tagline_html:
You buy the time and experience of other people.
The ads work. Clients come. Income flows.
system.step1_p: Activated ads. Once. After that the system works on its own.
system.step2_p: The system finds people on social media. Automatic. No calls or persuasion.
system.step3_p: Clients become investors. Locked into your network forever.
system.step4_p: A percentage from all their operations. Across all 9 levels deep. Automatically.
system.keystone_big_html:
You're not buying ads.
You're buying a channel that works infinitely.
system.keystone_small: Ads launched once — clients keep coming. Everyone who came through your ad stays in your partner network forever.

levels.title_html:
9 levels.
But the system builds them for you.
levels.lead: The good old partner scheme that has worked in the world for decades. Only before, a person built it themselves — now the GWAD ads build it.
levels.tree_more_label: ... and so on down to L9 (up to 512 people in the team)
levels.right_h3_html:
It's not you who invites.
You are the one being invited to.
levels.quote: Before, a person built these 9 levels themselves: searched, persuaded, sold. Half of them burned out on the first three referrals.
levels.p1_html: Now your partner network is built by GWAD ads. Launch — traffic flows — clients lock into your network automatically.
levels.p2_html: The payout mechanics are the same, proven over decades. You receive a percentage from purchases of people across all 9 levels of depth. Only now you don't need to find these people.
levels.stat1_lab: your average income from one diamond per year
levels.stat2_lab: the client remains your partner forever
levels.stat3_lab: people you need to personally persuade
levels.footnote_html: Just the good old partner mechanics. Only now they are built not by you — but by the ads. The network assembles itself, clients are locked in forever, percentages drip from all 9 levels. You own a built machine.

safety.eyebrow: Trust in code, not in words
safety.lead: Code cannot be cheated. Even if the founder disappears tomorrow — the money returns automatically. This is hardcoded into the blockchain.
safety.card1_p: The smart contract is deployed on opBNB. The address is public. The code passed the audit — 19 security parameters checked, all critical issues closed.
safety.card2_p: When you buy a share — you receive an NFT token in your SafePal. With the lot number and number of shares. No one can take it from you. This is your asset.
safety.card3_p: If the admin shows no activity for 90 days — the smart contract automatically returns USDT to all participants. Without my involvement. Cannot be cancelled.
safety.card4_p: If the lot didn't go through or the supplier failed — the administrator returns USDT to all participants. Tokens are burned. No one is left with a depreciated token.

roles.lead: The club isn't for everyone. It's for those who are ready to think not for a week, but for years. Choose a role — or combine all three.
roles.role1_tagline: "I have $100 free. I want to preserve and grow it. I understand that a diamond is more reliable than any coin."
roles.role1_li3: A real asset in your wallet
roles.role2_tagline: "I don't want to persuade anyone. I'll launch an ad once — the system will bring clients for me."
roles.role2_li3: Each one locks into your network forever
roles.role3_tagline: "I have a business. Looking for new directions. Interested in jewelry production under the club brand."
roles.role3_li1: Percentage from sales of all items
roles.role3_li2: Access to a closed B2B flow
roles.role3_li3: Token growth up to +720% on jewelry

finalcta.lead: What used to belong to a chosen few can today become part of your capital.
finalcta.step1_p: On the gws.ink platform. Free. 3 minutes.
finalcta.step2_p: Mobile wallet. Your keys — your money.
finalcta.step3_p: opBNB network. Minimum $50 (depends on the chosen lot). Network — opBNB only.
finalcta.step4_p: Choose a lot, click "Buy". 15 seconds — done.
finalcta.step5_p: GWAD ads. The system will bring clients itself.
finalcta.big_h3_html: Diamond Club — together we are strong
finalcta.big_p: We've built a club where everyone — from a student to a major entrepreneur — can become a co-owner of a real diamond. With a threshold from $50.

footer.brand_description: Investment shares of natural diamonds on the opBNB blockchain. Part of the GlobalWay ecosystem.
